consulta_coligacao_1990.source: override:transcribed from CONSULTA_LEGENDA_1990_AC.txt data row + Leia-me.pdf names (the Leia-me omits NOME_UE and SIGLA_COLIGACAO; data rows have 18 fields)
notes: 1990 zip data files have no header; the bundled Leia-me.pdf lists 17 variables but real rows carry 18 fields (NOME_UE present after SIGLA_UE, SIGLA_COLIGACAO before NOME_COLIGACAO).
